actions.name: BatchDeleteAttributes
actions.description: Grants permission to perform multiple DeleteAttributes operations in a single call, which reduces round trips and latencies

actions.name: BatchPutAttributes
actions.description: Grants permission to perform multiple PutAttribute operations in a single call, which reduces round trips and latencies

actions.name: CreateDomain
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new domain

actions.name: DeleteAttributes
actions.description: Grants permission to delete one or more attributes associated with the item

actions.name: DeleteDomain
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a domain

actions.name: DomainMetadata
actions.description: Grants permission to return information about the domain, including when the domain was created, the number of items and attributes, and the size of attribute names and values

actions.name: GetAttributes
actions.description: Grants permission to return all of the attributes associated with the item

actions.name: GetExport
actions.description: Grants permission to return information for an existing domain export arn

actions.name: ListDomains
actions.description: Grants permission to list all domains

actions.name: ListExports
actions.description: Grants permission to list all exports that were created. The results are paginated and can be filtered by domain name

actions.name: PutAttributes
actions.description: Grants permission to create or replace attributes in an item

actions.name: Select
actions.description: Grants permission to execute a query against the items in a domain

actions.name: StartDomainExport
actions.description: Grants permission to initiates the export of a SimpleDB domain to an S3 bucket
